events.tool_requests_json: [{"toolCallId":"call_75JVnElnXUyfpnKEYEgAGQz8","name":"run_in_terminal","arguments":"{\"command\":\"rtk bash -lc 'cat > tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh <<\\\"EOF\\\"\\n#!/bin/bash\\n# Stop hook for persisting agent chat transcripts through session-api\\n#\\n# Canonical location: tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh\\n# Referenced by: .github/hooks/hooks.json, .clinerules/hooks/hooks.json\\n\\nset -uo pipefail\\n\\nSCRIPT_DIR=\\\"$(cd \\\"$(dirname \\\"${BASH_SOURCE[0]}\\\")\\\" && pwd)\\\"\\nREPO_ROOT=\\\"$(cd \\\"$SCRIPT_DIR/../..\\\" && pwd)\\\"\\n\\nCARGO_BIN=\\\"\\\"\\nfor candidate in \\\\\\n    \\\"${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${USERPROFILE:-}\\\\\\\\.cargo\\\\\\\\bin\\\\\\\\cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${USERPROFILE:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"/c/Users/${USERNAME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"/c/Users/${USER:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\"\\ndo\\n    if [[ -n \\\"$candidate\\\" && -f \\\"$candidate\\\" ]]; then\\n        CARGO_BIN=\\\"$candidate\\\"\\n        break\\n    fi\\ndone\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" ]]; then\\n    CARGO_BIN=\\\"$(command -v cargo 2>/dev/null || true)\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif read -t 0; then\\n    INPUT=$(cat)\\nelse\\n    INPUT=\\\"{}\\\"\\nfi\\nTRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.transcript_path // .transcriptPath // empty)' 2>/dev/null)\\nHOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.hook_event_name // .hookEventName // \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\nSESSION_ID=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.session_id // .sessionId // \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n\\n# VS Code can provide Windows-style paths (c:\\\\\\\\Users\\\\\\\\...) even under bash.\\n# Normalize to a POSIX path so file existence checks and cargo args work.\\nif [[ -n \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" ]] && command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=\\\"$(cygpath -u \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" 2>/dev/null || echo \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\")\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" || ! -f \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" ]]; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] skip: transcript not found (event=$HOOK_EVENT_NAME session=$SESSION_ID path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH)\\\" >&2\\n    echo '{}'\\n    exit 0\\nfi\\n\\nWORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.workspace_slug // .workspaceSlug // \\\"default\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\nif [[ -z \\\"$WORKSPACE_SLUG\\\" || \\\"$WORKSPACE_SLUG\\\" == \\\"null\\\" ]]; then\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=\\\"default\\\"\\nfi\\nTRIGGER=\\\"${HOOK_EVENT_NAME:-stop}\\\"\\nif [[ -z \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" || \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" == \\\"unknown\\\" || \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" == \\\"null\\\" ]]; then\\n    TRIGGER=\\\"stop\\\"\\nfi\\nMANIFEST_PATH=\\\"$REPO_ROOT/memory-api/crates/session-api/Cargo.toml\\\"\\nSTORE_ROOT=\\\"$REPO_ROOT/.session\\\"\\n\\nif [[ ! -f \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\" ]]; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] Failed: manifest not found at $MANIFEST_PATH\\\" >&2\\n    exit 2\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -n \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" ]] && ! \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" run --quiet --manifest-path \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\" --bin copilot-stop-hook -- \\\\\\n    --transcript-path \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" \\\\\\n    --store-root \\\"$STORE_ROOT\\\" \\\\\\n    --workspace-slug \\\"$WORKSPACE_SLUG\\\" \\\\\\n    --trigger \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" >/dev/null; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] Failed to persist transcript from $TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" >&2\\n    exit 2\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" ]]; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] Failed: cargo binary not found\\\" >&2\\n    exit 2\\nfi\\n\\necho '{}'\\nexit 0\\nEOF\\nchmod +x tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh'\",\"explanation\":\"Rewrite stop hook with repo-root-anchored paths and executable mode.\",\"goal\":\"Apply robust cwd-independent fix\",\"mode\":\"sync\"}","type":"function"}]

{"command":"rtk bash -lc 'cat > tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh <<"EOF"
#!/bin/bash
# Stop hook for persisting agent chat transcripts through session-api
#
# Canonical location: tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh
# Referenced by: .github/hooks/hooks.json, .clinerules/hooks/hooks.json

set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"

CARGO_BIN=""
for candidate in \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USERNAME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USER:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe"
do
    if [[ -n "$candidate" && -f "$candidate" ]]; then
        CARGO_BIN="$candidate"
        break
    fi
done

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
    CARGO_BIN="$(command -v cargo 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi

if read -t 0; then
    INPUT=$(cat)
else
    INPUT="{}"
fi
TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.transcript_path // .transcriptPath // empty)' 2>/dev/null)
HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.hook_event_name // .hookEventName // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
SESSION_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.session_id // .sessionId // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)

# VS Code can provide Windows-style paths (c:\\Users\\...) even under bash.
# Normalize to a POSIX path so file existence checks and cargo args work.
if [[ -n "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]] && command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH="$(cygpath -u "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH")"
fi

if [[ -z "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" || ! -f "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] skip: transcript not found (event=$HOOK_EVENT_NAME session=$SESSION_ID path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH)" >&2
    echo '{}'
    exit 0
fi

WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.workspace_slug // .workspaceSlug // "default")' 2>/dev/null)
if [[ -z "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" || "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" == "null" ]]; then
    WORKSPACE_SLUG="default"
fi
TRIGGER="${HOOK_EVENT_NAME:-stop}"
if [[ -z "$TRIGGER" || "$TRIGGER" == "unknown" || "$TRIGGER" == "null" ]]; then
    TRIGGER="stop"
fi
MANIFEST_PATH="$REPO_ROOT/memory-api/crates/session-api/Cargo.toml"
STORE_ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/.session"

if [[ ! -f "$MANIFEST_PATH" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed: manifest not found at $MANIFEST_PATH" >&2
    exit 2
fi

if [[ -n "$CARGO_BIN" ]] && ! "$CARGO_BIN" run --quiet --manifest-path "$MANIFEST_PATH" --bin copilot-stop-hook -- \
    --transcript-path "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" \
    --store-root "$STORE_ROOT" \
    --workspace-slug "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" \
    --trigger "$TRIGGER" >/dev/null; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed to persist transcript from $TRANSCRIPT_PATH" >&2
    exit 2
fi

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed: cargo binary not found" >&2
    exit 2
fi

echo '{}'
exit 0
EOF
chmod +x tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh'","explanation":"Rewrite stop hook with repo-root-anchored paths and executable mode.","goal":"Apply robust cwd-independent fix","mode":"sync"}

{"command":"bash -lc 'cat > tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh <<'"'"'EOF'"'"'
#!/bin/bash
# Stop hook for persisting agent chat transcripts through session-api
#
# Canonical location: tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh
# Referenced by: .github/hooks/hooks.json, .clinerules/hooks/hooks.json

set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"

CARGO_BIN=""
for candidate in \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USERNAME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USER:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe"
do
    if [[ -n "$candidate" && -f "$candidate" ]]; then
        CARGO_BIN="$candidate"
        break
    fi
done

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
    CARGO_BIN="$(command -v cargo 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi

if read -t 0; then
    INPUT=$(cat)
else
    INPUT="{}"
fi
TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.transcript_path // .transcriptPath // empty)' 2>/dev/null)
HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.hook_event_name // .hookEventName // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
SESSION_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.session_id // .sessionId // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)

# VS Code can provide Windows-style paths (c:\\Users\\...) even under bash.
# Normalize to a POSIX path so file existence checks and cargo args work.
if [[ -n "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]] && command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH="$(cygpath -u "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH")"
fi

if [[ -z "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" || ! -f "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] skip: transcript not found (event=$HOOK_EVENT_NAME session=$SESSION_ID path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH)" >&2
    echo '{}'
    exit 0
fi

WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.workspace_slug // .workspaceSlug // "default")' 2>/dev/null)
if [[ -z "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" || "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" == "null" ]]; then
    WORKSPACE_SLUG="default"
fi
TRIGGER="${HOOK_EVENT_NAME:-stop}"
if [[ -z "$TRIGGER" || "$TRIGGER" == "unknown" || "$TRIGGER" == "null" ]]; then
    TRIGGER="stop"
fi
MANIFEST_PATH="$REPO_ROOT/memory-api/crates/session-api/Cargo.toml"
STORE_ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/.session"

if [[ ! -f "$MANIFEST_PATH" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed: manifest not found at $MANIFEST_PATH" >&2
    exit 2
fi

if [[ -n "$CARGO_BIN" ]] && ! "$CARGO_BIN" run --quiet --manifest-path "$MANIFEST_PATH" --bin copilot-stop-hook -- \
    --transcript-path "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" \
    --store-root "$STORE_ROOT" \
    --workspace-slug "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" \
    --trigger "$TRIGGER" >/dev/null; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed to persist transcript from $TRANSCRIPT_PATH" >&2
    exit 2
fi

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed: cargo binary not found" >&2
    exit 2

events.data_json:
{"messageId":"ce473cad-fcd6-4ea4-aec8-168cbfc6a590","content":"Root cause fixed: the stop hook was using cwd-relative paths, so when the hook executed from [memory-api](memory-api) it looked for a non-existent manifest path and never persisted the session.

What I changed:
- Added repo-root resolution in [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L9)
- Switched manifest/store paths to absolute-from-repo-root in [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L60)
- Added an explicit manifest existence guard in [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L63)

Validation performed:
1. Reproduced previous failure from subdirectory (manifest not found).
2. Re-ran from [memory-api](memory-api) with a real transcript fixture and UserPromptSubmit payload.
3. Hook now exits successfully and writes session files under:
- [.session/sessions/default/38095e95-c056-478a-8fe4-2b0a80f34573/session.json](.session/sessions/default/38095e95-c056-478a-8fe4-2b0a80f34573/session.json)
- [.session/sessions/default/38095e95-c056-478a-8fe4-2b0a80f34573/transcript.json](.session/sessions/default/38095e95-c056-478a-8fe4-2b0a80f34573/transcript.json)
- [.session/sessions/default/38095e95-c056-478a-8fe4-2b0a80f34573/events.json](.session/sessions/default/38095e95-c056-478a-8fe4-2b0a80f34573/events.json)

If you want, I can also harden stdin parsing next (to avoid edge cases where hook payload delivery is unusual), but your reported no-session issue is now resolved by the path fix.","toolRequests":[],"reasoningText":""}

events.tool_requests_json: [{"toolCallId":"call_Upf79eGjtv1DUxzF3n7rqG4p","name":"run_in_terminal","arguments":"{\"command\":\"cat > tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh <<'EOF'\\n#!/bin/bash\\n# Stop hook for persisting agent chat transcripts through session-api\\n#\\n# Canonical location: tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh\\n# Referenced by: .github/hooks/hooks.json, .clinerules/hooks/hooks.json\\n\\nset -uo pipefail\\n\\nSCRIPT_DIR=\\\"$(cd \\\"$(dirname \\\"${BASH_SOURCE[0]}\\\")\\\" && pwd)\\\"\\nREPO_ROOT=\\\"$(cd \\\"$SCRIPT_DIR/../..\\\" && pwd)\\\"\\n\\nCARGO_BIN=\\\"\\\"\\nfor candidate in \\\\\\n    \\\"${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${USERPROFILE:-}\\\\\\\\.cargo\\\\\\\\bin\\\\\\\\cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${USERPROFILE:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"/c/Users/${USERNAME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"/c/Users/${USER:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\"\\ndo\\n    if [[ -n \\\"$candidate\\\" && -f \\\"$candidate\\\" ]]; then\\n        CARGO_BIN=\\\"$candidate\\\"\\n        break\\n    fi\\ndone\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" ]]; then\\n    CARGO_BIN=\\\"$(command -v cargo 2>/dev/null || true)\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif read -t 0; then\\n    INPUT=$(cat)\\nelse\\n    INPUT=\\\"{}\\\"\\nfi\\nTRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.transcript_path // .transcriptPath // empty)' 2>/dev/null)\\nHOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.hook_event_name // .hookEventName // \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\nSESSION_ID=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.session_id // .sessionId // \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n\\n# VS Code can provide Windows-style paths (c:\\\\\\\\Users\\\\\\\\...) even under bash.\\n# Normalize to a POSIX path so file existence checks and cargo args work.\\nif [[ -n \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" ]] && command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=\\\"$(cygpath -u \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" 2>/dev/null || echo \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\")\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" || ! -f \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" ]]; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] skip: transcript not found (event=$HOOK_EVENT_NAME session=$SESSION_ID path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH)\\\" >&2\\n    echo '{}'\\n    exit 0\\nfi\\n\\nWORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.workspace_slug // .workspaceSlug // \\\"default\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\nif [[ -z \\\"$WORKSPACE_SLUG\\\" || \\\"$WORKSPACE_SLUG\\\" == \\\"null\\\" ]]; then\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=\\\"default\\\"\\nfi\\nTRIGGER=\\\"${HOOK_EVENT_NAME:-stop}\\\"\\nif [[ -z \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" || \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" == \\\"unknown\\\" || \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" == \\\"null\\\" ]]; then\\n    TRIGGER=\\\"stop\\\"\\nfi\\nMANIFEST_PATH=\\\"${SESSION_CAPTURE_MANIFEST_PATH:-$REPO_ROOT/memory-api/crates/session-api/Cargo.toml}\\\"\\nSTORE_ROOT=\\\"${SESSION_CAPTURE_STORE_ROOT:-$REPO_ROOT/.session}\\\"\\n\\nif [[ ! -f \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\" ]]; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] Failed: manifest not found at $MANIFEST_PATH\\\" >&2\\n    exit 2\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -n \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" ]] && ! \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" run --quiet --manifest-path \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\" --bin copilot-stop-hook -- \\\\\\n    --transcript-path \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" \\\\\\n    --store-root \\\"$STORE_ROOT\\\" \\\\\\n    --workspace-slug \\\"$WORKSPACE_SLUG\\\" \\\\\\n    --trigger \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" >/dev/null; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] Failed to persist transcript from $TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" >&2\\n    exit 2\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" ]]; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] Failed: cargo binary not found\\\" >&2\\n    exit 2\\nfi\\n\\necho '{}'\\nexit 0\\nEOF\\nchmod +x tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh\",\"explanation\":\"Rewrite stop hook with env-overridable manifest/store paths for fixture-based E2E tests.\",\"goal\":\"Finalize hook testability improvements\",\"mode\":\"sync\"}","type":"function"}]

{"command":"cat > tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
# Stop hook for persisting agent chat transcripts through session-api
#
# Canonical location: tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh
# Referenced by: .github/hooks/hooks.json, .clinerules/hooks/hooks.json

set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"

CARGO_BIN=""
for candidate in \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USERNAME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USER:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe"
do
    if [[ -n "$candidate" && -f "$candidate" ]]; then
        CARGO_BIN="$candidate"
        break
    fi
done

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
    CARGO_BIN="$(command -v cargo 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi

if read -t 0; then
    INPUT=$(cat)
else
    INPUT="{}"
fi
TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.transcript_path // .transcriptPath // empty)' 2>/dev/null)
HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.hook_event_name // .hookEventName // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
SESSION_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.session_id // .sessionId // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)

# VS Code can provide Windows-style paths (c:\\Users\\...) even under bash.
# Normalize to a POSIX path so file existence checks and cargo args work.
if [[ -n "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]] && command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH="$(cygpath -u "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH")"
fi

if [[ -z "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" || ! -f "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] skip: transcript not found (event=$HOOK_EVENT_NAME session=$SESSION_ID path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH)" >&2
    echo '{}'
    exit 0
fi

WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.workspace_slug // .workspaceSlug // "default")' 2>/dev/null)
if [[ -z "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" || "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" == "null" ]]; then
    WORKSPACE_SLUG="default"
fi
TRIGGER="${HOOK_EVENT_NAME:-stop}"
if [[ -z "$TRIGGER" || "$TRIGGER" == "unknown" || "$TRIGGER" == "null" ]]; then
    TRIGGER="stop"
fi
MANIFEST_PATH="${SESSION_CAPTURE_MANIFEST_PATH:-$REPO_ROOT/memory-api/crates/session-api/Cargo.toml}"
STORE_ROOT="${SESSION_CAPTURE_STORE_ROOT:-$REPO_ROOT/.session}"

if [[ ! -f "$MANIFEST_PATH" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed: manifest not found at $MANIFEST_PATH" >&2
    exit 2
fi

if [[ -n "$CARGO_BIN" ]] && ! "$CARGO_BIN" run --quiet --manifest-path "$MANIFEST_PATH" --bin copilot-stop-hook -- \
    --transcript-path "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" \
    --store-root "$STORE_ROOT" \
    --workspace-slug "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" \
    --trigger "$TRIGGER" >/dev/null; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed to persist transcript from $TRANSCRIPT_PATH" >&2
    exit 2
fi

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed: cargo binary not found" >&2
    exit 2
fi

echo '{}'
exit 0
EOF
chmod +x tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh","explanation":"Rewrite stop hook with env-overridable manifest/store paths for fixture-based E2E tests.","goal":"Finalize hook testability improvements","mode":"sync"}

e2e_stop_hook_script_persists_fixture_from_nested_workspace_cwd() {\\n    let repo_root = repo_root();\\n    let script_path = PathBuf::from(\\\"../tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh\\\");\\n    assert!(\\n        repo_root.join(\\\"tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh\\\").is_file(),\\n        \\\"missing hook script under repo root\\\"\\n    );\\n\\n    let fixture_text = include_str!(\\\"fixtures/stop_hook_workspace_e2e.jsonl\\\");\\n    let temp = tempdir().expect(\\\"tempdir\\\");\\n    let transcript_path = temp.path().join(\\\"copilot.jsonl\\\");\\n    fs::write(&transcript_path, fixture_text).expect(\\\"write transcript fixture\\\");\\n\\n    let store_root = temp.path().join(\\\"session-store\\\");\\n    fs::create_dir_all(&store_root).expect(\\\"create temp store root\\\");\\n\\n    let payload = serde_json::json!({\\n        \\\"transcript_path\\\": transcript_path,\\n        \\\"workspace_slug\\\": \\\"fixture-workspace\\\",\\n        \\\"hook_event_name\\\": \\\"UserPromptSubmit\\\",\\n        \\\"session_id\\\": LOCAL_FIXTURE_SESSION_ID,\\n    })\\n    .to_string();\\n\\n    let mut child = match Command::new(\\\"bash\\\")\\n        .arg(&script_path)\\n        .current_dir(repo_root.join(\\\"memory-api\\\"))\\n        .env(\\\"SESSION_CAPTURE_STORE_ROOT\\\", &store_root)\\n        .stdin(Stdio::piped())\\n        .stdout(Stdio::piped())\\n        .stderr(Stdio::piped())\\n        .spawn()\\n    {\\n        Ok(child) => child,\\n        Err(error) if error.kind() == std::io::ErrorKind::NotFound => {\\n            eprintln!(\\\"skipping e2e shell-hook test: bash not available on PATH\\\");\\n            return;\\n        },\\n        Err(error) => panic!(\\\"failed to spawn bash for hook test: {error}\\\"),\\n    };\\n\\n    child\\n        .stdin\\n        .as_mut()\\n        .expect(\\\"stdin should be piped\\\")\\n        .write_all(payload.as_bytes())\\n        .expect(\\\"write hook payload to stdin\\\");\\n\\n    let output = child.wait_with_output().expect(\\\"wait for hook process\\\");\\n    let stdout = String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stdout);\\n    let stderr = String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stderr);\\n    assert!(\\n        output.status.success(),\\n        \\\"session-capture-stop.sh failed: stdout={stdout} stderr={stderr}\\\"\\n    );\\n    assert_eq!(stdout.trim(), \\\"{}\\\", \\\"stop hook should emit empty JSON sentinel\\\");\\n\\n    let config = SessionStoreConfig::new(&store_root, \\\"fixture-workspace\\\");\\n    let record = config\\n        .read_session(LOCAL_FIXTURE_SESSION_ID)\\n        .expect(\\\"stop hook should persist fixture transcript into the temp store\\\");\\n\\n    assert_eq!(record.session_id, LOCAL_FIXTURE_SESSION_ID);\\n    assert_eq!(record.metadata.workspace_slug, \\\"fixture-workspace\\\");\\n    assert_eq!(record.metadata.trigger.as_deref(), Some(\\\"UserPromptSubmit\\\"));\\n    assert_eq!(record.turns.len(), 2);\\n    assert_eq!(record.turns[0].content, \\\"Persist this transcript from fixture\\\");\\n    assert_eq!(record.turns[1].content, \\\"Transcript persisted from fixture.\\\");\\n\\n    let session_dir = store_root\\n        .join(\\\"sessions\\\")\\n        .join(\\\"fixture-workspace\\\")\\n        .join(LOCAL_FIXTURE_SESSION_ID);\\n    assert!(session_dir.join(\\\"session.json\\\").is_file());\\n    assert!(session_dir.join(\\\"transcript.json\\\").is_file());\\n    assert!(session_dir.join(\\\"events.json\\\").is_file());\\n}\\n\\n#[test]\\nfn e2e_parses_multiple_transcript_fixtures_from_root() {\\n    let root = transcripts_root();\\n    if !root.is_dir() {\\n        eprintln!(\\n            \\\"skipping root fixture scan: transcript root does not exist at {}\\\",\\n            root.display()\\n        );\\n        return;\\n    }\\n\\n    let mut fixtures = fs::read_dir(&root)\\n        .expect(\\\"read transcript fixture root\\\")\\n        .filter_map(|entry| entry.ok())\\n        .map(|entry| entry.path())\\n        .filter(|path| {\\n            path.extension().and_then(|ext| ext.to_str()) == Some(\\\"jsonl\\\")\\n        })\\n        .collect::<Vec<_>>();\\n    fixtures.sort();\\n\\n    let sample_size = fixtures.len().min(3);\\n    assert!(\\n        sample_size > 0,\\n        \\\"expected at least one .jsonl transcript fixture\\\"\\n    );\\n\\n    let mut parsed = 0usize;\\n    for path in fixtures.iter().take(sample_size) {\\n        if let Ok(payload) = copilot_payload_from_transcript_path(\\n            path,\\n            \\\"default\\\",\\n            Some(\\\"e2e-scan\\\".to_string()),\\n        ) {\\n            if !payload.messages.is_empty() {\\n                parsed += 1;\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    assert!(\\n        parsed > 0,\\n        \\\"expected at least one sampled fixture transcript to parse with visible messages\\\"\\n    );\\n}\\nEOF\",\"explanation\":\"Patch failing E2E test to invoke hook script via relative path from nested cwd, avoiding Windows extended-path issues.\",\"goal\":\"Stabilize fixture E2E shell-hook test on Windows {"command":"cat > tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
# Stop hook for persisting agent chat transcripts through session-api
#
# Canonical location: tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh
# Referenced by: .github/hooks/hooks.json, .clinerules/hooks/hooks.json

set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"

CARGO_BIN=""
for candidate in \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USERNAME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USER:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe"
do
    if [[ -n "$candidate" && -f "$candidate" ]]; then
        CARGO_BIN="$candidate"
        break
    fi
done

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
    CARGO_BIN="$(command -v cargo 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi

if read -t 0; then
    INPUT=$(cat)
else
    INPUT="{}"
fi

if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.transcript_path // .transcriptPath // empty)' 2>/dev/null)
    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.hook_event_name // .hookEventName // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    SESSION_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.session_id // .sessionId // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.workspace_slug // .workspaceSlug // "default")' 2>/dev/null)
elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("transcript_path") or d.get("transcriptPath") or "")' 2>/dev/null)
    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("hook_event_name") or d.get("hookEventName") or "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    SESSION_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("session_id") or d.get("sessionId") or "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("workspace_slug") or d.get("workspaceSlug") or "default")' 2>/dev/null)
else
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=""
    HOOK_EVENT_NAME="unknown"
    SESSION_ID="unknown"
    WORKSPACE_SLUG="default"
fi

# VS Code can provide Windows-style paths (c:\\Users\\...) even under bash.
# Normalize to a POSIX path so file existence checks and cargo args work.
if [[ -n "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]] && command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH="$(cygpath -u "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH")"
fi

if [[ -z "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" || ! -f "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] skip: transcript not found (event=$HOOK_EVENT_NAME session=$SESSION_ID path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH)" >&2
    echo '{}'
    exit 0
fi

if [[ -z "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" || "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" == "null" ]]; then
    WORKSPACE_SLUG="default"
fi
TRIGGER="${HOOK_EVENT_NAME:-stop}"
if [[ -z "$TRIGGER" || "$TRIGGER" == "unknown" || "$TRIGGER" == "null" ]]; then
    TRIGGER="stop"
fi
MANIFEST_PATH="${SESSION_CAPTURE_MANIFEST_PATH:-$REPO_ROOT/memory-api/crates/session-api/Cargo.toml}"
STORE_ROOT="${SESSION_CAPTURE_STORE_ROOT:-$REPO_ROOT/.session}"

if [[ ! -f "$MANIFEST_PATH" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed: manifest not found at $MANIFEST_PATH" >&2
    exit 2
fi

if [[ -n "$CARGO_BIN" ]] && ! "$CARGO_BIN" run --quiet --manifest-path "$MANIFEST_PATH" --bin copilot-stop-hook -- \
    --transcript-path "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" \
    --store-root "$STORE_ROOT" \
    --workspace-slug "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" \
    --trigger "$TRIGGER" >/dev/null; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed to persist transcript from $TRANSCRIPT_PATH" >&2
    exit 2
fi

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed: cargo binary not found" >&2
    exit 2
fi

echo '{}'
exit 0
EOF
chmod +x tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh","explanation":"Harden hook payload parsing with jq-or-python fallback so E2E tests and hooks work even when jq is absent.","goal":"Fix non-persistence caused by unavailable jq during script execution","mode":"sync"}

events.tool_requests_json: [{"toolCallId":"call_9z8vGDO9ttVnBsJdXEPF476g","name":"run_in_terminal","arguments":"{\"command\":\"cat > tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh <<'EOF'\\n#!/bin/bash\\n# Stop hook for persisting agent chat transcripts through session-api\\n#\\n# Canonical location: tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh\\n# Referenced by: .github/hooks/hooks.json, .clinerules/hooks/hooks.json\\n\\nset -uo pipefail\\n\\nSCRIPT_DIR=\\\"$(cd \\\"$(dirname \\\"${BASH_SOURCE[0]}\\\")\\\" && pwd)\\\"\\nREPO_ROOT=\\\"$(cd \\\"$SCRIPT_DIR/../..\\\" && pwd)\\\"\\n\\nCARGO_BIN=\\\"\\\"\\nfor candidate in \\\\\\n    \\\"${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${USERPROFILE:-}\\\\\\\\.cargo\\\\\\\\bin\\\\\\\\cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${USERPROFILE:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"/c/Users/${USERNAME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"/c/Users/${USER:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\"\\ndo\\n    if [[ -n \\\"$candidate\\\" && -f \\\"$candidate\\\" ]]; then\\n        CARGO_BIN=\\\"$candidate\\\"\\n        break\\n    fi\\ndone\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" ]]; then\\n    CARGO_BIN=\\\"$(command -v cargo 2>/dev/null || true)\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -p /dev/stdin || ! -t 0 ]]; then\\n    INPUT=$(cat)\\nelse\\n    INPUT=\\\"{}\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.transcript_path // .transcriptPath // empty)' 2>/dev/null)\\n    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.hook_event_name // .hookEventName // \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    SESSION_ID=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.session_id // .sessionId // \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.workspace_slug // .workspaceSlug // \\\"default\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\nelif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"transcript_path\\\") or d.get(\\\"transcriptPath\\\") or \\\"\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"hook_event_name\\\") or d.get(\\\"hookEventName\\\") or \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    SESSION_ID=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"session_id\\\") or d.get(\\\"sessionId\\\") or \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"workspace_slug\\\") or d.get(\\\"workspaceSlug\\\") or \\\"default\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\nelse\\n    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=\\\"\\\"\\n    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=\\\"unknown\\\"\\n    SESSION_ID=\\\"unknown\\\"\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=\\\"default\\\"\\nfi\\n\\n# VS Code can provide Windows-style paths (c:\\\\\\\\Users\\\\\\\\...) even under bash.\\n# Normalize to POSIX paths so bash checks and cargo args work consistently.\\nif [[ -n \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" ]] && command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=\\\"$(cygpath -u \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" 2>/dev/null || echo \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\")\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" || ! -f \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" ]]; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] skip: transcript not found (event=$HOOK_EVENT_NAME session=$SESSION_ID path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH)\\\" >&2\\n    echo '{}'\\n    exit 0\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$WORKSPACE_SLUG\\\" || \\\"$WORKSPACE_SLUG\\\" == \\\"null\\\" ]]; then\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=\\\"default\\\"\\nfi\\nTRIGGER=\\\"${HOOK_EVENT_NAME:-stop}\\\"\\nif [[ -z \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" || \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" == \\\"unknown\\\" || \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" == \\\"null\\\" ]]; then\\n    TRIGGER=\\\"stop\\\"\\nfi\\nMANIFEST_PATH=\\\"${SESSION_CAPTURE_MANIFEST_PATH:-$REPO_ROOT/memory-api/crates/session-api/Cargo.toml}\\\"\\nSTORE_ROOT=\\\"${SESSION_CAPTURE_STORE_ROOT:-$REPO_ROOT/.session}\\\"\\n\\nif [[ -n \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\" ]] && command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n    MANIFEST_PATH=\\\"$(cygpath -u \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\" 2>/dev/null || echo \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\")\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -n \\\"$STORE_ROOT\\\" ]] && command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n    STORE_ROOT=\\\"$(cygpath -u \\\"$STORE_ROOT\\\" 2>/dev/null || echo \\\"$STORE_ROOT\\\")\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ ! -f \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\" ]]; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] Failed: manifest not found at $MANIFEST_PATH\\\" >&2\\n    exit 2\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -n \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" ]] && ! \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" run --quiet --manifest-path \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\" --bin copilot-stop-hook -- \\\\\\n    --transcript-path \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" \\\\\\n    --store-root \\\"$STORE_ROOT\\\" \\\\\\n    --workspace-slug \\\"$WORKSPACE_SLUG\\\" \\\\\\n    --trigger \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" >/dev/null; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] Failed to persist transcript from $TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" >&2\\n    exit 2\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" ]]; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] Failed: cargo binary not found\\\" >&2\\n    exit 2\\nfi\\n\\necho '{}'\\nexit 0\\nEOF\\nchmod +x tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh\",\"explanation\":\"Rewrite hook with robust stdin handling, jq/python fallback, and Windows path normalization for manifest/store/transcript inputs.\",\"goal\":\"Stabilize hook behavior and make fixture E2E deterministic\",\"mode\":\"sync\"}","type":"function"}]

#!/bin/bash
# Stop hook for persisting agent chat transcripts through session-api
#
# Canonical location: tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh
# Referenced by: .github/hooks/hooks.json, .clinerules/hooks/hooks.json

set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"

CARGO_BIN=""
for candidate in \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USERNAME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USER:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe"
do
    if [[ -n "$candidate" && -f "$candidate" ]]; then
        CARGO_BIN="$candidate"
        break
    fi
done

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
    CARGO_BIN="$(command -v cargo 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi

if [[ -p /dev/stdin || ! -t 0 ]]; then
    INPUT=$(cat)
else
    INPUT="{}"
fi

if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.transcript_path // .transcriptPath // empty)' 2>/dev/null)
    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.hook_event_name // .hookEventName // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    SESSION_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.session_id // .sessionId // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.workspace_slug // .workspaceSlug // "default")' 2>/dev/null)
elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("transcript_path") or d.get("transcriptPath") or "")' 2>/dev/null)
    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("hook_event_name") or d.get("hookEventName") or "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    SESSION_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("session_id") or d.get("sessionId") or "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("workspace_slug") or d.get("workspaceSlug") or "default")' 2>/dev/null)
else
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=""
    HOOK_EVENT_NAME="unknown"
    SESSION_ID="unknown"
    WORKSPACE_SLUG="default"
fi

# VS Code can provide Windows-style paths (c:\\Users\\...) even under bash.
# Normalize to POSIX paths so bash checks and cargo args work consistently.
if [[ -n "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]] && command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH="$(cygpath -u "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH")"
fi

if [[ -z "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" || ! -f "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] skip: transcript not found (event=$HOOK_EVENT_NAME session=$SESSION_ID path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH)" >&2
    echo '{}'
    exit 0
fi

if [[ -z "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" || "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" == "null" ]]; then
    WORKSPACE_SLUG="default"
fi
TRIGGER="${HOOK_EVENT_NAME:-stop}"
if [[ -z "$TRIGGER" || "$TRIGGER" == "unknown" || "$TRIGGER" == "null" ]]; then
    TRIGGER="stop"
fi
MANIFEST_PATH="${SESSION_CAPTURE_MANIFEST_PATH:-$REPO_ROOT/memory-api/crates/session-api/Cargo.toml}"
STORE_ROOT="${SESSION_CAPTURE_STORE_ROOT:-$REPO_ROOT/.session}"

if [[ -n "$MANIFEST_PATH" ]] && command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    MANIFEST_PATH="$(cygpath -u "$MANIFEST_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo "$MANIFEST_PATH")"
fi

if [[ -n "$STORE_ROOT" ]] && command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    STORE_ROOT="$(cygpath -u "$STORE_ROOT" 2>/dev/null || echo "$STORE_ROOT")"
fi

if [[ ! -f "$MANIFEST_PATH" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed: manifest not found at $MANIFEST_PATH" >&2
    exit 2
fi

if [[ -n "$CARGO_BIN" ]] && ! "$CARGO_BIN" run --quiet --manifest-path "$MANIFEST_PATH" --bin copilot-stop-hook -- \
    --transcript-path "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" \
    --store-root "$STORE_ROOT" \
    --workspace-slug "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" \
    --trigger "$TRIGGER" >/dev/null; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed to persist transcript from $TRANSCRIPT_PATH" >&2
    exit 2
fi

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed: cargo binary not found" >&2
    exit 2
fi

echo '{}'
exit 0
EOF
chmod +x tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh","explanation":"Rewrite hook with robust stdin handling, jq/python fallback, and Windows path normalization for manifest/store/transcript inputs.","goal":"Stabilize hook behavior and make fixture E2E deterministic","mode":"sync"}

events.tool_requests_json: [{"toolCallId":"call_eQarZnegnOFMrifLOuNrWJFN","name":"run_in_terminal","arguments":"{\"command\":\"cat > tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh <<'EOF'\\n#!/bin/bash\\n# Stop hook for persisting agent chat transcripts through session-api\\n#\\n# Canonical location: tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh\\n# Referenced by: .github/hooks/hooks.json, .clinerules/hooks/hooks.json\\n\\nset -uo pipefail\\n\\nSCRIPT_DIR=\\\"$(cd \\\"$(dirname \\\"${BASH_SOURCE[0]}\\\")\\\" && pwd)\\\"\\nREPO_ROOT=\\\"$(cd \\\"$SCRIPT_DIR/../..\\\" && pwd)\\\"\\n\\nnormalize_path() {\\n    local p=\\\"$1\\\"\\n    p=\\\"${p//\\\\\\\\//}\\\"\\n    if [[ \\\"$p\\\" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:/ ]]; then\\n        local drive=\\\"${p:0:1}\\\"\\n        p=\\\"/${drive,,}${p:2}\\\"\\n    fi\\n    echo \\\"$p\\\"\\n}\\n\\nCARGO_BIN=\\\"\\\"\\nfor candidate in \\\\\\n    \\\"${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${USERPROFILE:-}\\\\\\\\.cargo\\\\\\\\bin\\\\\\\\cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${USERPROFILE:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"/c/Users/${USERNAME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"/c/Users/${USER:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\"\\ndo\\n    if [[ -n \\\"$candidate\\\" && -f \\\"$candidate\\\" ]]; then\\n        CARGO_BIN=\\\"$candidate\\\"\\n        break\\n    fi\\ndone\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" ]]; then\\n    CARGO_BIN=\\\"$(command -v cargo 2>/dev/null || true)\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -p /dev/stdin || ! -t 0 ]]; then\\n    INPUT=$(cat)\\nelse\\n    INPUT=\\\"{}\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.transcript_path // .transcriptPath // empty)' 2>/dev/null)\\n    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.hook_event_name // .hookEventName // \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    SESSION_ID=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.session_id // .sessionId // \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.workspace_slug // .workspaceSlug // \\\"default\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\nelif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"transcript_path\\\") or d.get(\\\"transcriptPath\\\") or \\\"\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"hook_event_name\\\") or d.get(\\\"hookEventName\\\") or \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    SESSION_ID=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"session_id\\\") or d.get(\\\"sessionId\\\") or \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"workspace_slug\\\") or d.get(\\\"workspaceSlug\\\") or \\\"default\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\nelse\\n    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=\\\"\\\"\\n    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=\\\"unknown\\\"\\n    SESSION_ID=\\\"unknown\\\"\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=\\\"default\\\"\\nfi\\n\\n# Normalize paths whether or not cygpath is installed.\\nif [[ -n \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" ]]; then\\n    if command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n        TRANSCRIPT_PATH=\\\"$(cygpath -u \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" 2>/dev/null || echo \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\")\\\"\\n    else\\n        TRANSCRIPT_PATH=\\\"$(normalize_path \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\")\\\"\\n    fi\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" || ! -f \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" ]]; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] skip: transcript not found (event=$HOOK_EVENT_NAME session=$SESSION_ID path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH)\\\" >&2\\n    echo '{}'\\n    exit 0\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$WORKSPACE_SLUG\\\" || \\\"$WORKSPACE_SLUG\\\" == \\\"null\\\" ]]; then\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=\\\"default\\\"\\nfi\\nTRIGGER=\\\"${HOOK_EVENT_NAME:-stop}\\\"\\nif [[ -z \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" || \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" == \\\"unknown\\\" || \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" == \\\"null\\\" ]]; then\\n    TRIGGER=\\\"stop\\\"\\nfi\\nMANIFEST_PATH=\\\"${SESSION_CAPTURE_MANIFEST_PATH:-$REPO_ROOT/memory-api/crates/session-api/Cargo.toml}\\\"\\nSTORE_ROOT=\\\"${SESSION_CAPTURE_STORE_ROOT:-$REPO_ROOT/.session}\\\"\\n\\nif command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n    MANIFEST_PATH=\\\"$(cygpath -u \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\" 2>/dev/null || echo \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\")\\\"\\n    STORE_ROOT=\\\"$(cygpath -u \\\"$STORE_ROOT\\\" 2>/dev/null || echo \\\"$STORE_ROOT\\\")\\\"\\nelse\\n    MANIFEST_PATH=\\\"$(normalize_path \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\")\\\"\\n    STORE_ROOT=\\\"$(normalize_path \\\"$STORE_ROOT\\\")\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ ! -f \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\" ]]; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] Failed: manifest not found at $MANIFEST_PATH\\\" >&2\\n    exit 2\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -n \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" ]] && ! \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" run --quiet --manifest-path \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\" --bin copilot-stop-hook -- \\\\\\n    --transcript-path \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" \\\\\\n    --store-root \\\"$STORE_ROOT\\\" \\\\\\n    --workspace-slug \\\"$WORKSPACE_SLUG\\\" \\\\\\n    --trigger \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" >/dev/null; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] Failed to persist transcript from $TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" >&2\\n    exit 2\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" ]]; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] Failed: cargo binary not found\\\" >&2\\n    exit 2\\nfi\\n\\necho '{}'\\nexit 0\\nEOF\\nchmod +x tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh\",\"explanation\":\"Add built-in path normalization fallback when cygpath is unavailable, covering transcript/store/manifest paths.\",\"goal\":\"Make hook payload path handling robust in cargo test and production shells\",\"mode\":\"sync\"}","type":"function"}]

events.tool_arguments_json:
{"command":"cat > tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
# Stop hook for persisting agent chat transcripts through session-api
#
# Canonical location: tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh
# Referenced by: .github/hooks/hooks.json, .clinerules/hooks/hooks.json

set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"

normalize_path() {
    local p="$1"
    p="${p//\\//}"
    if [[ "$p" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:/ ]]; then
        local drive="${p:0:1}"
        p="/${drive,,}${p:2}"
    fi
    echo "$p"
}

CARGO_BIN=""
for candidate in \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USERNAME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USER:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe"
do
    if [[ -n "$candidate" && -f "$candidate" ]]; then
        CARGO_BIN="$candidate"
        break
    fi
done

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
    CARGO_BIN="$(command -v cargo 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi

if [[ -p /dev/stdin || ! -t 0 ]]; then
    INPUT=$(cat)
else
    INPUT="{}"
fi

if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.transcript_path // .transcriptPath // empty)' 2>/dev/null)
    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.hook_event_name // .hookEventName // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    SESSION_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.session_id // .sessionId // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.workspace_slug // .workspaceSlug // "default")' 2>/dev/null)
elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("transcript_path") or d.get("transcriptPath") or "")' 2>/dev/null)
    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("hook_event_name") or d.get("hookEventName") or "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    SESSION_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("session_id") or d.get("sessionId") or "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("workspace_slug") or d.get("workspaceSlug") or "default")' 2>/dev/null)
else
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=""
    HOOK_EVENT_NAME="unknown"
    SESSION_ID="unknown"
    WORKSPACE_SLUG="default"
fi

# Normalize paths whether or not cygpath is installed.
if [[ -n "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]]; then
    if command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        TRANSCRIPT_PATH="$(cygpath -u "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH")"
    else
        TRANSCRIPT_PATH="$(normalize_path "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH")"
    fi
fi

events.tool_arguments_json:
{"command":"cat > tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
# Stop hook for persisting agent chat transcripts through session-api
#
# Canonical location: tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh
# Referenced by: .github/hooks/hooks.json, .clinerules/hooks/hooks.json

set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"

normalize_path() {
    local p="$1"
    p="${p//\\//}"
    if [[ "$p" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:/ ]]; then
        local drive="${p:0:1}"
        p="/${drive,,}${p:2}"
    fi
    echo "$p"
}

CARGO_BIN=""
for candidate in \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USERNAME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USER:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe"
do
    if [[ -n "$candidate" && -f "$candidate" ]]; then
        CARGO_BIN="$candidate"
        break
    fi
done

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" && -n "${CARGO:-}" ]]; then
    CARGO_BIN="$CARGO"
fi

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
    CARGO_BIN="$(command -v cargo 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi

if [[ -p /dev/stdin || ! -t 0 ]]; then
    INPUT=$(cat)
else
    INPUT="{}"
fi

if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then

-t 0 ]]; then\\n    INPUT=$(cat)\\nelse\\n    INPUT=\\\"{}\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.transcript_path // .transcriptPath // empty)' 2>/dev/null)\\n    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.hook_event_name // .hookEventName // \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    SESSION_ID=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.session_id // .sessionId // \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.workspace_slug // .workspaceSlug // \\\"default\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\nelif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"transcript_path\\\") or d.get(\\\"transcriptPath\\\") or \\\"\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"hook_event_name\\\") or d.get(\\\"hookEventName\\\") or \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    SESSION_ID=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"session_id\\\") or d.get(\\\"sessionId\\\") or \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"workspace_slug\\\") or d.get(\\\"workspaceSlug\\\") or \\\"default\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\nelse\\n    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=\\\"\\\"\\n    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=\\\"unknown\\\"\\n    SESSION_ID=\\\"unknown\\\"\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=\\\"default\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -n \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" ]]; then\\n    if command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n        TRANSCRIPT_PATH=\\\"$(cygpath -u \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" 2>/dev/null || echo \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\")\\\"\\n    else\\n        TRANSCRIPT_PATH=\\\"$(normalize_path \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\")\\\"\\n    fi\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" || ! events.tool_arguments_json:
{"command":"cat > tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
# Stop hook for persisting agent chat transcripts through session-api
#
# Canonical location: tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh
# Referenced by: .github/hooks/hooks.json, .clinerules/hooks/hooks.json

set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"

normalize_path() {
    local p="$1"
    p="${p//\\//}"
    if [[ "$p" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:/ ]]; then
        local drive="${p:0:1}"
        p="/${drive,,}${p:2}"
    fi
    echo "$p"
}

CARGO_BIN=""
for candidate in \
    "${SESSION_CAPTURE_CARGO_BIN:-}" \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USERNAME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USER:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe"
do
    if [[ -n "$candidate" && -f "$candidate" ]]; then
        CARGO_BIN="$candidate"
        break
    fi
done

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" && -n "${CARGO:-}" ]]; then
    CARGO_BIN="$CARGO"
fi

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
    CARGO_BIN="$(command -v cargo 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi

if [[ -p /dev/stdin || ! -t 0 ]]; then
    INPUT=$(cat)
else
    INPUT="{}"
fi

if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.transcript_path // .transcriptPath // empty)' 2>/dev/null)
    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.hook_event_name // .hookEventName // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)

events.tool_requests_json: [{"toolCallId":"call_DX9bAgm9PTsf3VKYbxY1DglR","name":"run_in_terminal","arguments":"{\"command\":\"cat > tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh <<'EOF'\\n#!/bin/bash\\n# Stop hook for persisting agent chat transcripts through session-api\\n#\\n# Canonical location: tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh\\n# Referenced by: .github/hooks/hooks.json, .clinerules/hooks/hooks.json\\n\\nset -uo pipefail\\n\\nSCRIPT_DIR=\\\"$(cd \\\"$(dirname \\\"${BASH_SOURCE[0]}\\\")\\\" && pwd)\\\"\\nREPO_ROOT=\\\"$(cd \\\"$SCRIPT_DIR/../..\\\" && pwd)\\\"\\n\\nnormalize_path() {\\n    local p=\\\"$1\\\"\\n    p=\\\"${p//\\\\\\\\//}\\\"\\n    if [[ \\\"$p\\\" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:/ ]]; then\\n        local drive=\\\"${p:0:1}\\\"\\n        p=\\\"/${drive,,}${p:2}\\\"\\n    fi\\n    echo \\\"$p\\\"\\n}\\n\\nCARGO_BIN=\\\"\\\"\\nfor candidate in \\\\\\n    \\\"${SESSION_CAPTURE_CARGO_BIN:-}\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${USERPROFILE:-}\\\\\\\\.cargo\\\\\\\\bin\\\\\\\\cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"${USERPROFILE:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"/c/Users/${USERNAME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"/c/Users/${USER:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe\\\" \\\\\\n    \\\"cargo\\\"\\ndo\\n    [[ -z \\\"$candidate\\\" ]] && continue\\n\\n    candidate_norm=\\\"$candidate\\\"\\n    if [[ \\\"$candidate_norm\\\" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:[\\\\\\\\/].* ]]; then\\n        candidate_norm=\\\"$(normalize_path \\\"$candidate_norm\\\")\\\"\\n    fi\\n\\n    if [[ -f \\\"$candidate_norm\\\" ]]; then\\n        CARGO_BIN=\\\"$candidate_norm\\\"\\n        break\\n    fi\\n\\n    resolved_candidate=\\\"$(command -v \\\"$candidate_norm\\\" 2>/dev/null || true)\\\"\\n    if [[ -n \\\"$resolved_candidate\\\" ]]; then\\n        CARGO_BIN=\\\"$resolved_candidate\\\"\\n        break\\n    fi\\ndone\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" && -n \\\"${CARGO:-}\\\" ]]; then\\n    CARGO_BIN=\\\"$CARGO\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -n \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" && \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:[\\\\\\\\/].* ]]; then\\n    CARGO_BIN=\\\"$(normalize_path \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\")\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" ]]; then\\n    CARGO_BIN=\\\"$(command -v cargo 2>/dev/null || true)\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -p /dev/stdin || ! -t 0 ]]; then\\n    INPUT=$(cat)\\nelse\\n    INPUT=\\\"{}\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.transcript_path // .transcriptPath // empty)' 2>/dev/null)\\n    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.hook_event_name // .hookEventName // \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    SESSION_ID=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.session_id // .sessionId // \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | jq -r '(.workspace_slug // .workspaceSlug // \\\"default\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\nelif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"transcript_path\\\") or d.get(\\\"transcriptPath\\\") or \\\"\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"hook_event_name\\\") or d.get(\\\"hookEventName\\\") or \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    SESSION_ID=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"session_id\\\") or d.get(\\\"sessionId\\\") or \\\"unknown\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo \\\"$INPUT\\\" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\\\"workspace_slug\\\") or d.get(\\\"workspaceSlug\\\") or \\\"default\\\")' 2>/dev/null)\\nelse\\n    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=\\\"\\\"\\n    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=\\\"unknown\\\"\\n    SESSION_ID=\\\"unknown\\\"\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=\\\"default\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -n \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" ]]; then\\n    if command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n        TRANSCRIPT_PATH=\\\"$(cygpath -u \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" 2>/dev/null || echo \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\")\\\"\\n    else\\n        TRANSCRIPT_PATH=\\\"$(normalize_path \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\")\\\"\\n    fi\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" || ! -f \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" ]]; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] skip: transcript not found (event=$HOOK_EVENT_NAME session=$SESSION_ID path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH)\\\" >&2\\n    echo '{}'\\n    exit 0\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$WORKSPACE_SLUG\\\" || \\\"$WORKSPACE_SLUG\\\" == \\\"null\\\" ]]; then\\n    WORKSPACE_SLUG=\\\"default\\\"\\nfi\\nTRIGGER=\\\"${HOOK_EVENT_NAME:-stop}\\\"\\nif [[ -z \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" || \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" == \\\"unknown\\\" || \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" == \\\"null\\\" ]]; then\\n    TRIGGER=\\\"stop\\\"\\nfi\\nMANIFEST_PATH=\\\"${SESSION_CAPTURE_MANIFEST_PATH:-$REPO_ROOT/memory-api/crates/session-api/Cargo.toml}\\\"\\nSTORE_ROOT=\\\"${SESSION_CAPTURE_STORE_ROOT:-$REPO_ROOT/.session}\\\"\\n\\nif command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then\\n    MANIFEST_PATH=\\\"$(cygpath -u \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\" 2>/dev/null || echo \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\")\\\"\\n    STORE_ROOT=\\\"$(cygpath -u \\\"$STORE_ROOT\\\" 2>/dev/null || echo \\\"$STORE_ROOT\\\")\\\"\\nelse\\n    MANIFEST_PATH=\\\"$(normalize_path \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\")\\\"\\n    STORE_ROOT=\\\"$(normalize_path \\\"$STORE_ROOT\\\")\\\"\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ ! -f \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\" ]]; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] Failed: manifest not found at $MANIFEST_PATH\\\" >&2\\n    exit 2\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -n \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" ]] && ! \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" run --quiet --manifest-path \\\"$MANIFEST_PATH\\\" --bin copilot-stop-hook -- \\\\\\n    --transcript-path \\\"$TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" \\\\\\n    --store-root \\\"$STORE_ROOT\\\" \\\\\\n    --workspace-slug \\\"$WORKSPACE_SLUG\\\" \\\\\\n    --trigger \\\"$TRIGGER\\\" >/dev/null; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] Failed to persist transcript from $TRANSCRIPT_PATH\\\" >&2\\n    exit 2\\nfi\\n\\nif [[ -z \\\"$CARGO_BIN\\\" ]]; then\\n    echo \\\"[session-capture-stop] Failed: cargo binary not found\\\" >&2\\n    exit 2\\nfi\\n\\necho '{}'\\nexit 0\\nEOF\\nchmod +x tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh\",\"explanation\":\"Fix cargo discovery by normalizing Windows paths before file checks and supporting command-name resolution.\",\"goal\":\"Make hook reliably find cargo in shell E2E and runtime environments\",\"mode\":\"sync\"}","type":"function"}]

{"command":"cat > tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
# Stop hook for persisting agent chat transcripts through session-api
#
# Canonical location: tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh
# Referenced by: .github/hooks/hooks.json, .clinerules/hooks/hooks.json

set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"

normalize_path() {
    local p="$1"
    p="${p//\\//}"
    if [[ "$p" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:/ ]]; then
        local drive="${p:0:1}"
        p="/${drive,,}${p:2}"
    fi
    echo "$p"
}

CARGO_BIN=""
for candidate in \
    "${SESSION_CAPTURE_CARGO_BIN:-}" \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "${HOME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe" \
    "${USERPROFILE:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USERNAME:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "/c/Users/${USER:-}/.cargo/bin/cargo.exe" \
    "cargo"
do
    [[ -z "$candidate" ]] && continue

    candidate_norm="$candidate"
    if [[ "$candidate_norm" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:[\\/].* ]]; then
        candidate_norm="$(normalize_path "$candidate_norm")"
    fi

    if [[ -f "$candidate_norm" ]]; then
        CARGO_BIN="$candidate_norm"
        break
    fi

    resolved_candidate="$(command -v "$candidate_norm" 2>/dev/null || true)"
    if [[ -n "$resolved_candidate" ]]; then
        CARGO_BIN="$resolved_candidate"
        break
    fi
done

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" && -n "${CARGO:-}" ]]; then
    CARGO_BIN="$CARGO"
fi

if [[ -n "$CARGO_BIN" && "$CARGO_BIN" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:[\\/].* ]]; then
    CARGO_BIN="$(normalize_path "$CARGO_BIN")"
fi

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
    CARGO_BIN="$(command -v cargo 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi

if [[ -p /dev/stdin || ! -t 0 ]]; then
    INPUT=$(cat)
else
    INPUT="{}"
fi

if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.transcript_path // .transcriptPath // empty)' 2>/dev/null)
    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.hook_event_name // .hookEventName // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    SESSION_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.session_id // .sessionId // "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.workspace_slug // .workspaceSlug // "default")' 2>/dev/null)
elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("transcript_path") or d.get("transcriptPath") or "")' 2>/dev/null)
    HOOK_EVENT_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("hook_event_name") or d.get("hookEventName") or "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    SESSION_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("session_id") or d.get("sessionId") or "unknown")' 2>/dev/null)
    WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("workspace_slug") or d.get("workspaceSlug") or "default")' 2>/dev/null)
else
    TRANSCRIPT_PATH=""
    HOOK_EVENT_NAME="unknown"
    SESSION_ID="unknown"
    WORKSPACE_SLUG="default"
fi

if [[ -n "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]]; then
    if command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        TRANSCRIPT_PATH="$(cygpath -u "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH")"
    else
        TRANSCRIPT_PATH="$(normalize_path "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH")"
    fi
fi

if [[ -z "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" || ! -f "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] skip: transcript not found (event=$HOOK_EVENT_NAME session=$SESSION_ID path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH)" >&2
    echo '{}'
    exit 0
fi

if [[ -z "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" || "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" == "null" ]]; then
    WORKSPACE_SLUG="default"
fi
TRIGGER="${HOOK_EVENT_NAME:-stop}"
if [[ -z "$TRIGGER" || "$TRIGGER" == "unknown" || "$TRIGGER" == "null" ]]; then
    TRIGGER="stop"
fi
MANIFEST_PATH="${SESSION_CAPTURE_MANIFEST_PATH:-$REPO_ROOT/memory-api/crates/session-api/Cargo.toml}"
STORE_ROOT="${SESSION_CAPTURE_STORE_ROOT:-$REPO_ROOT/.session}"

if command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    MANIFEST_PATH="$(cygpath -u "$MANIFEST_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo "$MANIFEST_PATH")"
    STORE_ROOT="$(cygpath -u "$STORE_ROOT" 2>/dev/null || echo "$STORE_ROOT")"
else
    MANIFEST_PATH="$(normalize_path "$MANIFEST_PATH")"
    STORE_ROOT="$(normalize_path "$STORE_ROOT")"
fi

if [[ ! -f "$MANIFEST_PATH" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed: manifest not found at $MANIFEST_PATH" >&2
    exit 2
fi

if [[ -n "$CARGO_BIN" ]] && ! "$CARGO_BIN" run --quiet --manifest-path "$MANIFEST_PATH" --bin copilot-stop-hook -- \
    --transcript-path "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" \
    --store-root "$STORE_ROOT" \
    --workspace-slug "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" \
    --trigger "$TRIGGER" >/dev/null; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed to persist transcript from $TRANSCRIPT_PATH" >&2
    exit 2
fi

if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed: cargo binary not found" >&2
    exit 2
fi

echo '{}'
exit 0
EOF
chmod +x tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh","explanation":"Fix cargo discovery by normalizing Windows paths before file checks and supporting command-name resolution.","goal":"Make hook reliably find cargo in shell E2E and runtime environments","mode":"sync"}

events.data_json:
{"messageId":"9b0381ed-6054-4ee5-8cef-f239fb82d4bd","content":"Implemented. There is now fixture-backed end-to-end coverage for the session stop hook, integrated with the existing session-api integration test suite.

What I changed

1. Hardened the stop hook so it is testable and more robust in mixed Windows/bash environments:
- Added path normalization helper and applied it to cargo/transcript/store/manifest paths: [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L12)
- Made cargo discovery more resilient:
  - supports explicit override via SESSION_CAPTURE_CARGO_BIN
  - checks multiple common cargo locations
  - falls back to command lookup
  - normalizes Windows-style cargo paths before use
  - see [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L22)
- Replaced stdin handling with a non-consuming check so hook payload JSON is reliably read:
  - [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L64)
- Added jq/python payload parsing fallback:
  - [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L70)

2. Added a local deterministic transcript fixture for workspace E2E:
- [memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/fixtures/stop_hook_workspace_e2e.jsonl](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/fixtures/stop_hook_workspace_e2e.jsonl)

3. Integrated a new shell-hook E2E integration test into existing test infrastructure:
- New test function: [memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs#L194)
- It now:
  - creates a workspace-relative temp fixture under memory-api/target
  - invokes the real shell hook script from nested workspace cwd
  - passes hook payload JSON through stdin
  - verifies persisted session artifacts in the target store
- Cargo discovery helper used by the test subprocess:
  - [memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs#L62)

Validation run

- Executed: cargo test -p session-api --test copilot_stop_hook_e2e -- --nocapture
- Result: 4 passed (suite green)

Notes

- The shell E2E test includes environment-aware skip behavior only for missing bash/cargo resolution in subprocess edge cases, but in your current setup it completes successfully and the suite passes.
- Changed files are:
  - [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh)
  - [memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs)
  - [memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/fixtures/stop_hook_workspace_e2e.jsonl](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/fixtures/stop_hook_workspace_e2e.jsonl)

","toolRequests":[],"reasoningText":""}

events.data_json:
{"messageId":"d0c17951-ba0f-4e0e-b178-7499a58a0dca","content":"You are absolutely right. I cleaned the leaked production artifact immediately and then hardened the test isolation so this does not happen again.

What I fixed

1. Removed the leaked live artifact from the root session store
- Deleted the leaked fixture workspace directory under the root .session store.
- Verified it is no longer present.

2. Made the hook more resilient for cross-shell Windows test execution
- Updated cargo discovery, path normalization, and payload parsing robustness in [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L12) through [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L139).
- Added explicit cargo override support via SESSION_CAPTURE_CARGO_BIN in [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L24).
- Kept explicit store-root override behavior in [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L109).

3. Hardened the E2E test to prevent live-store collisions
- E2E test now uses unique per-run workspace slug and session id, derived from a unique suffix, so it cannot collide with live paths:
  - [memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs#L218)
- The fixture transcript content is rewritten at runtime to embed that unique session id:
  - [memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs#L220)
- Added explicit assertion that no root .session leak was created:
  - [memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs#L297)
- Test continues to use the existing fixture source file:
  - [memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/fixtures/stop_hook_workspace_e2e.jsonl](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/fixtures/stop_hook_workspace_e2e.jsonl#L1)

Validation

- Ran focused suite: cargo test -p session-api --test copilot_stop_hook_e2e -- --nocapture
- Result: 4 passed

Current changed files

- [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh)
- [memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs)
- [memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/fixtures/stop_hook_workspace_e2e.jsonl](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/fixtures/stop_hook_workspace_e2e.jsonl)

","toolRequests":[],"reasoningText":""}

events.tool_arguments_json:
{"explanation":"Add persistent trace logging to session-capture-stop.sh without changing transcript_path-only behavior.","input":"*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: c:\Users\linus\git\graph_app\context-engine\tools\agent-hooks\session-capture-stop.sh
@@
 set -uo pipefail
 
 SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
 REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
+TRACE_LOG_PATH="${SESSION_CAPTURE_TRACE_LOG:-$REPO_ROOT/.session/hook-logs/session-capture-stop.log}"
+
+mkdir -p "$(dirname "$TRACE_LOG_PATH")" 2>/dev/null || true
+
+log_trace() {
+    local level="$1"
+    local message="$2"
+    printf '%s [%s] %s\n' "$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")" "$level" "$message" >>"$TRACE_LOG_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true
+}
+
+log_trace "INFO" "hook start pwd=$PWD"
@@
 if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
     CARGO_BIN="$(command -v cargo 2>/dev/null || true)"
 fi
+
+log_trace "INFO" "cargo candidate resolved path=${CARGO_BIN:-<empty>}"
@@
 if [[ -p /dev/stdin || ! -t 0 ]]; then
     INPUT=$(cat)
 else
     INPUT="{}"
 fi
+
+log_trace "INFO" "stdin captured bytes=${#INPUT}"
@@
 if [[ -n "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]]; then
@@
 fi
+
+log_trace "INFO" "parsed payload event=$HOOK_EVENT_NAME session=$SESSION_ID workspace=$WORKSPACE_SLUG transcript_path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH"
@@
 if [[ -z "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" || ! -f "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]]; then
+    if [[ -n "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" ]]; then
+        log_trace "WARN" "transcript missing path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH"
+    else
+        log_trace "WARN" "transcript path empty in hook payload"
+    fi
     echo "[session-capture-stop] skip: transcript not found (event=$HOOK_EVENT_NAME session=$SESSION_ID path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH)" >&2
     echo '{}'
     exit 0
 fi
+
+log_trace "INFO" "transcript found path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH"
@@
 if [[ ! -f "$MANIFEST_PATH" ]]; then
+    log_trace "ERROR" "manifest missing path=$MANIFEST_PATH"
     echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed: manifest not found at $MANIFEST_PATH" >&2
     exit 2
 fi
+
+log_trace "INFO" "store_root=$STORE_ROOT manifest_path=$MANIFEST_PATH trigger=$TRIGGER"
 
-if [[ -n "$CARGO_BIN" ]] && ! "$CARGO_BIN" run --quiet --manifest-path "$MANIFEST_PATH" --bin copilot-stop-hook -- \
-    --transcript-path "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" \
-    --store-root "$STORE_ROOT" \
-    --workspace-slug "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" \
-    --trigger "$TRIGGER" >/dev/null; then
-    echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed to persist transcript from $TRANSCRIPT_PATH" >&2
-    exit 2
-fi
+if [[ -n "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
+    CARGO_STDERR_FILE="$(mktemp 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
+    if ! "$CARGO_BIN" run --quiet --manifest-path "$MANIFEST_PATH" --bin copilot-stop-hook -- \
+        --transcript-path "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" \
+        --store-root "$STORE_ROOT" \
+        --workspace-slug "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" \
+        --trigger "$TRIGGER" >/dev/null 2>"$CARGO_STDERR_FILE"; then
+        if [[ -n "$CARGO_STDERR_FILE" && -f "$CARGO_STDERR_FILE" ]]; then
+            while IFS= read -r line; do
+                log_trace "ERROR" "cargo run stderr: $line"
+            done <"$CARGO_STDERR_FILE"
+        fi
+        rm -f "$CARGO_STDERR_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
+        log_trace "ERROR" "failed to persist transcript path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH"
+        echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed to persist transcript from $TRANSCRIPT_PATH (see $TRACE_LOG_PATH)" >&2
+        exit 2
+    fi
+    rm -f "$CARGO_STDERR_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
+else
+    log_trace "ERROR" "cargo binary unresolved"
+fi
@@
 if [[ -z "$CARGO_BIN" ]]; then
     echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed: cargo binary not found" >&2
     exit 2
 fi
+
+log_trace "INFO" "hook success session=$SESSION_ID transcript_path=$TRANSCRIPT_PATH"
*** End Patch"}

{"messageId":"ac5d5b2f-549c-427f-bdcb-a6afe90b3c7f","content":"Implemented exactly what you asked: no transcript fallback logic, only traceability.

What changed

- Added persistent hook tracing to [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L1):
  - start marker + pwd
  - resolved cargo path
  - stdin payload size
  - parsed event/session/workspace/transcript_path
  - transcript file existence result
  - manifest/store/trigger values
  - cargo stderr lines when persistence fails
  - final success marker

- Trace file path:
  - [.session/hook-logs/session-capture-stop.log](.session/hook-logs/session-capture-stop.log)

What the trace already shows (real smoking gun)

From the latest log entries, your hook is repeatedly firing as PostToolUse and receiving transcript paths like:

- /.../transcripts/12061c49-f5b1-44bd-91d6-2f39d473afa4.jsonl

Then immediately logging:

- transcript missing path=...

So the hook is firing, transcript_path is present, but the file at that path does not exist at that event timing.

When I invoked with a known existing transcript path, it logged:

- transcript found
- hook success

and persisted correctly.

Validated

- Script syntax OK.
- Trace file is written on every invocation.
- Success/failure reasons are now explicit in the trace log.

Next step for your failing current session

- Trigger one more prompt, then inspect the newest lines in:
  - [.session/hook-logs/session-capture-stop.log](.session/hook-logs/session-capture-stop.log)

You should now get exact reason per invocation, including whether it was:
1. transcript missing
2. cargo unresolved
3. cargo run stderr failure
4. success

If you want, I can now tune only event wiring (not parser/fallback behavior) so this hook runs only on events where transcript files are actually present, to stop false skips/noise.","toolRequests":[],"reasoningText":""}

events.data_json:
{"messageId":"f2524c28-fc6f-4686-a603-9a4809126789","content":"Cleaned. I removed the synthetic session artifact from the authoritative store and verified no synthetic fixture sessions remain.

Removed:
- [.session/sessions/default/38095e95-c056-478a-8fe4-2b0a80f34573/session.json](.session/sessions/default/38095e95-c056-478a-8fe4-2b0a80f34573/session.json) and its directory

Verification result:
- no remaining session records matching fixture ids/workspaces in [.session/sessions](.session/sessions)

Going forward, I will only validate hooks with a throwaway store root and throwaway trace path, never the live [.session](.session) tree.  
Validation pattern I’ll use:

```bash
TMP_DIR="$(mktemp -d)"
SESSION_CAPTURE_STORE_ROOT="$TMP_DIR/.session" \
SESSION_CAPTURE_TRACE_LOG="$TMP_DIR/session-capture-stop.log" \
bash tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh < payload.json
```

If you want, I can also move default trace logging out of live [.session](.session) (for example into `target/tmp/`) so even diagnostics stay non-authoritative by default.","toolRequests":[],"reasoningText":""}

{"messageId":"c408d917-b4c3-4836-9293-688ba0cc7e2d","content":"It is here:

- [memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs#L194)

The end-to-end test function is:

- [e2e_stop_hook_script_persists_fixture_from_nested_workspace_cwd](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs#L194)

What it does to avoid live-store pollution:

1. Uses a throwaway store under memory-api target, not root .session:
- [rel_store_root setup](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs#L215)
- [passes SESSION_CAPTURE_STORE_ROOT to hook](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs#L236)

2. Asserts there was no leak into the authoritative root store:
- [leak assertion against root .session](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs#L297)

3. Cleans the throwaway directory at the end:
- [cleanup remove_dir_all(abs_dir)](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs#L329)

Fixture it uses:

- [memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/fixtures/stop_hook_workspace_e2e.jsonl](memory-api/crates/session-api/tests/fixtures/stop_hook_workspace_e2e.jsonl#L1)

If you want, I can tighten this further by adding a panic-safe cleanup guard so cleanup also happens automatically on assertion failure (not only on normal return).","toolRequests":[],"reasoningText":""}

{"explanation":"Fix transcript path resolution across /c and /mnt/c bash environments and broaden cargo candidate discovery for WSL-style paths.","input":"*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: c:\Users\linus\git\graph_app\context-engine\tools\agent-hooks\session-capture-stop.sh
@@
 normalize_path() {
     local p="$1"
     p="${p//\\//}"
     if [[ "$p" =~ ^[A-Za-z]:/ ]]; then
         local drive="${p:0:1}"
-        p="/${drive,,}${p:2}"
+        if [[ -d "/${drive,,}" ]]; then
+            p="/${drive,,}${p:2}"
+        elif [[ -d "/mnt/${drive,,}" ]]; then
+            p="/mnt/${drive,,}${p:2}"
+        else
+            p="/${drive,,}${p:2}"

{"messageId":"97e15cec-cf0a-4ce8-b42e-471685159a3a","content":"Found the root cause in the latest hook logs and confirmed it.

What the logs showed

- The hook was firing for your current session id 12061c49-f5b1-44bd-91d6-2f39d473afa4.
- Payload had transcript_path populated.
- It kept logging transcript missing for a path under /c/Users/... while the hook process cwd in those failing runs was /mnt/c/... style.
- So this was not a missing payload problem. It was a path-style mismatch in bash runtime.

Relevant trace evidence is now in:
- [.session/hook-logs/session-capture-stop.log](.session/hook-logs/session-capture-stop.log)

What I changed

I kept transcript_path as the only source and fixed path handling around it.

- Added robust Windows path normalization and drive-prefix swap between /c/... and /mnt/c/...:
  - [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L23)
  - [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L39)
  - [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L128)
- Applied the same normalization to manifest/store paths:
  - [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L159)
  - [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L170)
- Kept full trace logging for each run:
  - [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh#L11)

Validation performed

- Replayed the hook using your current session transcript_path and session id into a temporary throwaway store.
- Result: success, and session manifest was created for 12061c49-f5b1-44bd-91d6-2f39d473afa4 in the temp store.
- No synthetic write was made to live .session during this validation.

If you trigger one new prompt now, the next lines in:
- [.session/hook-logs/session-capture-stop.log](.session/hook-logs/session-capture-stop.log)
should show either transcript found plus hook success, or a precise hard failure with stderr details.","toolRequests":[],"reasoningText":""}
